prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类（含理科）最低位次依次为约 32682→11719→10285→12926→14212，2022 年大幅前移后近三年持续后移，2025 年基准约 14212 名；该校在甘肃省物理类招生计划：2021 年 30 人、2022 年 31 人、2023 年 31 人、2024 年 35 人、2025 年 35 人；2026 年（招生计划文件）计划 46 人，较 2025 年扩招约 31%，计划增幅明显，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021 年第 103 名→2022 年第 85 名→2023 年第 83 名→2024 年第 83 名→2025 年第 61 名→2026 年第 63 名，已进入全国前 70 强，学校综合实力和品牌认可度稳步提升；2026 年高考周期声誉评价为偏负面，主要原因是 2025 年录取季该校在河北、河南等地录取位次下滑超 500 名，中医学专业在黑龙江、吉林等省份出现断档；抖音热度排名第 103（一般），短视频曝光量偏低，报考关注度未出现明显升温信号；中医学、中药学、中西医结合等为该校核心优势学科（第五轮学科评估数据未收录该校， 参考第四轮评估中医学 A+、中西医结合 A+、中药学 B+），与招生专业高度对应，对中医药方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业社会热度持续偏热（2024 年临床医学 ，推荐）；中医学作为中医药类核心专业，受益于国家对中医药事业的持续支持，报考热度稳中有升；甘肃省 2026 年高考总考生约 21.87 万人，较 2025 年（约 17.98 万）增长约 21.6%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧；北京中医药大学位于北京市（非本省），甘肃考生报考属跨省选择；该校在甘肃招 生占比约 1.2%（2025 年），属于中等偏小规模省份，招生计划调整对全国格局影响有限但对甘肃本地影响较直接。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 14212 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 31%（推低位次数字减小）、学校排名持续上升至全国第 63 名（增强吸引力）、甘肃省考生总数增长约 21.6%（加剧竞争）、声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般（略有降温效应）等多重因素，扩招效应与考生增加效应相互对冲，学校排名上升对报考热度有正向拉动，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年小幅后移。预测最低位次约 16952 名，区间 16452–17452 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 32682 → 11719 → 10285 → 12926 → 14212. After a significant advance in 2022, rankings have continuously declined over the past three years, with a baseline of about 14212 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Gansu Province for Physics Category: 30 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 31 in 2023, 35 in 2024, 35 in 2025; for 2026 (enrollment plan document), it plans 46, an increase of about 31% compared to 2025. The plan has increased significantly, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have been rising in recent years: 103rd in 2021 → 85th in 2022 → 83rd in 2023 → 83rd in 2024 → 61st in 2025 → 63rd in 2026, entering the top 70 nationally. The university's comprehensive strength and brand recognition are steadily improving. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to the university's admission rankings dropping by over 500 places in Hebei, Henan and other regions during the 2025 admission season, and the Chinese Medicine major experiencing gaps in Heilongjiang, Jilin and other provinces. Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd (average), short video exposure is low, and there is no clear signal of increased application attention. Chinese Medicine, Chinese Materia Medica, and Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine are the university's core advantageous disciplines (the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include this university; reference to the fourth round evaluation: Chinese Medicine A+, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine A+, Chinese Materia Medica B+), highly corresponding to the enrollment majors, and strongly attractive to candidates interested in Chinese medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology continue to be socially popular (Clinical Medicine recommended in 2024); Chinese Medicine, as a core major in the Chinese medicine field, benefits from the state's sustained support for the Chinese medicine industry, with application popularity steadily rising. The total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Gansu Province is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (about 179,800), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing (not in the province), so Gansu candidates applying are making a cross-province choice. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 1.2% (2025), making it a medium-to-small scale province; adjustments to the enrollment plan have limited impact on the national landscape but a more direct impact on Gansu locally.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 14212, a significant enrollment expansion of about 31% in 2026 (pushing the ranking number down), the university's ranking continuously rising to 63rd nationally (enhancing attractiveness), a total candidate increase of about 21.6% in Gansu Province (intensifying competition), a slightly negative reputation and average Douyin popularity (slight cooling effect), the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect offset each other, while the university's ranking rise positively pulls application popularity. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 16952, with a range of 16452–17452.

- Integrated Chinese and Western Clinical Medicine (Hua Tuo Class)
- Chinese Medicine (Excellent 5+3 Integrated Program)

- Chinese Medicine
- Acupuncture and Tuina

- Chinese Medicine Pharmacy
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Pharmaceutical Administration
- Rehabilitation Therapy
- Nursing
- Big Data Management and Application (Cheng Siwei Top Talent Class)
- Public Administration/Public Service Management (Health Management Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 16952, range 16452–17452. Candidates within the predicted range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Chinese Medicine, Acupuncture and Tuina, Chinese Materia Medica). Tier 1 majors (Leading Talent Training Program, Hua Tuo Class, Excellent 5+3 Integrated Program) require a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range to attempt. Tier 3 majors (Nursing, Big Data Management, Public Service Management) can serve as safe choices. Chinese medicine majors have prominent disciplinary advantages and stable social demand. It is recommended to combine personal interests and career plans for a reasonable mix.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including Liberal Arts) were approximately 1356→1571→803→1655→1317, with significant fluctuations. After a large forward shift in 2023, it fell back in 2024, then rebounded to about 1317 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for History Category: 4 students in 2021, 3 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 2 in 2024, 3 in 2025; for 2026 (enrollment plan document), it plans 4 students, an increase of about 33% compared to 2025, a significant expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science ranking has been rising in recent years to 63rd nationally, with steadily improving comprehensive strength and brand recognition, also attractive to liberal arts candidates; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly due to the decline in admission rankings in 2025 and gaps in some provinces; Douyin popularity ranking is 103 (average), with no obvious warming signal; Chinese Medicine A+, Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine A+ are the core advantageous disciplines of the university. The History Category enrollment majors (Acupuncture and Tuina, English (Medical), Public Affairs Management (Health Management)) are highly related to Chinese medicine disciplines, attractive to liberal arts candidates interested in Chinese medicine-related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, and Gansu candidates apply across provinces; the enrollment scale for History Category in Gansu is very small (2–4 students), and small changes in the enrollment plan are sensitive to ranking impact; the social popularity of medical-related majors continues to be hot; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Gansu Province is about 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025, intensifying overall competition; the scale of History Category candidates is estimated proportionally at about 71,000, an increase of about 22% compared to 2025 (about 58,400), significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1317, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 33% (pushing the ranking number down), the university's rising ranking (enhancing attractiveness), the increase in Gansu Province History Category candidates by about 22% (intensifying competition), and the slightly negative reputation (slightly cooling), the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect basically offset each other. The university's ranking rise has a positive pull on application popularity. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1605, with a range of 1316–1894.

- Acupuncture and Tuina
- English (Medical Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Affairs Management (Health Management Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1605, range 1316–1894. There are only 3 majors in History Category. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (≤1316), focus on sprinting for Acupuncture and Tuina (Tier 1). If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to mainly target English (Medical Direction). If the ranking is near the lower limit of the range (≥1894), Public Affairs Management (Health Management) can be a safe choice. Liberal arts majors in Chinese medicine colleges are limited, so it is recommended to combine personal interests and career planning for reasonable positioning.
